testimonials.quote: After my first week on weight loss peptides, I was free from the obsession of food. I am now able to eat consciously and hear my body when it's done. I'm not distracted by my body constantly telling me that I have to eat. I lost 30 pounds over the 4 months that I was on it. But it is the freedom in my mind that has been life-changing. I don't stand in the pantry and fridge looking for the next snack. I'm not counting the hours until my next meal. And I'm not spending hours a week in meetings focusing on overcoming my addiction.
testimonials.author: — Marcella Hill
